name: Goddess Urd's Verdict
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>め</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ウルドの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>裁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>断</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Your opponent cannot target "Valkyrie" monsters you control with card effects, also they cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. Once per turn: You can declare 1 card name, then target 1 Set card your opponent controls; reveal the Set card, and if it was the declared card, banish it. Otherwise, banish 1 card you control.
eff: Your opponent cannot target "Valkyrie" monsters you control with card effects, also they cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects. Once per turn: You can declare 1 card name, then target 1 Set card your opponent controls; reveal the Set card, and if it was the declared card, banish it. Otherwise, banish 1 card you control.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
